overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking along a scenic autumn riverside trail toward a wooden settlement. The environment features vibrant fall foliage, misty mountains, and transitions from natural wilderness to a village entrance with a fast travel point.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside the river, surrounded by yellow autumn foliage

entered.detail: tall trees with bright yellow fall foliage lining the riverside
calm greenish water running parallel to the path
rocky dirt trail winding through the natural landscape
hazy mountain peaks visible in the background
leafless tree trunk standing near the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy walking along a dirt trail beside a calm river. Yellow autumn trees line the left side while the path winds through a natural landscape with distant mountains visible ahead.

events.description: passing a lit campfire brazier mounted on a wooden stand to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the view opens to reveal a dramatic misty mountain peak and red autumn foliage

entered.detail: metal fire bowl on wooden stand with visible flames
trees with vibrant red and orange fall leaves
large rocky mountain shrouded in clouds and mist dominating the horizon

segments.scene_description: The path curves to reveal a dramatic misty mountain vista. The character passes a lit campfire brazier on the right as the foliage transitions to vibrant red autumn colors and the yellow trees recede into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: settlement approach with wooden gate and stream crossing

events.description: wooden settlement gate becomes visible in the distance ahead
crossing a shallow stream section flowing across the dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking toward the settlement entrance while navigating intermittent stream crossings on the path

entered.detail: large wooden archway and gate marking the settlement entrance
shallow water flowing across the path with rocky banks
rustic wooden post fencing lining the right side of the path
steep rock face rising on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wooden settlement gate visible in the distance, crossing shallow stream sections along the path. The terrain features wooden fencing and a steep rocky cliff rises on the right while the mountain vista shifts to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: settlement entrance with fast travel point

events.description: passing a wooden signpost on the left side of the path
approaching a glowing blue fast travel marker labeled Barren Light on a rock

agents.ego_description: approaching the settlement entrance gate and passing the Barren Light fast travel point

entered.detail: stone monument with glowing blue holographic symbol and text reading Barren Light
wooden structures and tents visible inside the settlement beyond the gate
tall wooden post with directional signs

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the settlement entrance, passing a wooden signpost and the glowing blue 'Barren Light' fast travel marker. The wooden gate structure looms directly ahead as the path enters the village proper, with buildings visible beyond the archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a riverside trail that transforms from a wild autumn wilderness into the entrance of a wooden settlement. It begins with Aloy walking a dirt path beside a calm river, flanked by yellow autumn trees and distant mountains. As the path curves, the scenery shifts toward a dramatic misty mountain vista and the foliage transitions from yellow to vibrant red, passing a lit campfire brazier along the way. The scene then opens up as the character crosses shallow stream sections and passes a steep rocky cliff, with the mountain vista shifting to the left as a wooden settlement gate appears in the distance. Finally, the camera approaches the village entrance, passing a wooden signpost and a glowing blue fast travel marker before the path leads directly through the wooden archway into the settlement.
